speaker: Strict Teacher
text: Good morning, class. Before we begin today's lesson, I'd like to introduce a new student. Everyone, say hello to Marcus.

speaker: Pre-teen Boy
text: Hi everyone. I just moved here from Chicago.

speaker: Strict Teacher
text: Welcome, Marcus. You can take the empty seat next to Sofia. Now, open your textbooks to chapter seven.

speaker: Pre-teen Girl
text: Miss, I forgot my textbook at home. Can I share with Marcus?

speaker: Strict Teacher
text: That is your third time this week, Sofia. You will stay after class today. Yes, you may share for now.

speaker: Pre-teen Boy
text: It's okay, I don't mind sharing.

speaker: Pre-teen Girl
text: Thanks, Marcus. I like your backpack by the way.

speaker: Strict Teacher
text: Sofia. Eyes on the board, please.

speaker: Pre-teen Boy
text: I'll help you catch up on the chapter at lunch if you want.

speaker: Strict Teacher
text: That is very kind, Marcus. Now, chapter seven. The American Revolution. Who can tell me what year it began?
